name: Pot Roasted Pork
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub the pork roast with salt and pepper.
2. Make tiny slits in the meat and insert slivers of garlic.
3. Place the roast in a broiler pan and broil for 15 to 20 minutes to remove excess fat.
4. Put one sliced onion at the bottom of a crock pot.
5. Add the browned pork roast and remaining onions and other ingredients.
6. Cover and cook on low until done, about 10 hours.
7. To thicken gravy:
a. Remove the roast to a serving platter.
b. Blend 2 tbsp cornstarch with 2 tbsp cold water to form a smooth paste.
c. Set on high and pour in the paste.
d. Stir well and let come to a boil for about 15 minutes until thickened.
